snippet.title: Chan Chun Sing on whether he is next in line to be Singapore's prime minister
snippet.description:
With DPM Heng Swee Keat having taken himself out of the running as Singapore's prime minister, his deputy, Chan Chun Sing, was asked if he was next in line.

"Now that DPM has decided to step aside as leader of the 4G, the 4G team should be given the opportunity to relook the question of succession holistically, and we will make a collective decision on who will be the next leader of the 4G in due course," Mr Chan said in response. https://cna.asia/3uvIZAq

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack SnyderвАЩs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero whoвАЩs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), itвАЩs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thingвАЩs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√ґfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√Їl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (TaylorвАЩs Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вАЬMr. Perfectly FineвАЭ (TaylorвАЩs Version) (From The Vault) вАУ off her upcoming Fearless (TaylorвАЩs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

вЦЇSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
вЦЇExclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

вЦЇFollow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

вЦЇFollow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвАЩve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that youвАЩre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвАЩve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnвАЩt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youвАЩre all the same
Because I hear heвАЩs got his arm вАШround a brand new girl
IвАЩve been picking up my heart
HeвАЩs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itвАЩs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвАЩs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвАЩs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвАЩs really such a shame
ItвАЩs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвАЩm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвАЩll miss me
But by then youвАЩll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвАЩs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвАЩve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвАЩre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вАЬYou Belong With MeвАЭ (TaylorвАЩs Version) вАУ off her Fearless (TaylorвАЩs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion.

Official Lyrics:
 
YouвАЩre on the phone with your girlfriend 
SheвАЩs upset, sheвАЩs going off about something that you said 
Cause she doesnвАЩt get your humor like I do 

IвАЩm in my room itвАЩs a typical Tuesday night
IвАЩm listening to the kind of music she doesnвАЩt like 
And sheвАЩll never know your story like I do 

Cause she wears short skirts, I wear t-shirts 
SheвАЩs cheer captain and IвАЩm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вАШbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвАЩre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me
 You belong with me 

Walk in the streets with you in your worn out jeans 
I canвАЩt help thinking this is how it ought to be 
Laughing on a park bench thinking to myself, hey isnвАЩt this easy 

And youвАЩve got a smile that could light up this whole town 
I havenвАЩt seen it in a while since she brought you down 
You say youвАЩre fine I know you better than that 
Hey what you doing with a girl like that 

She wears high heels, I wear sneakers 
SheвАЩs cheer captain and IвАЩm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вАШbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвАЩre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 

Oh I remember you driving to my house in the middle of the night 
IвАЩm the one who makes you laugh when you know youвАЩre вАШbout to cry 
I know your favorite songs and you tell me about your dreams 
I think I know where you belong, I think I know itвАЩs with me 

CanвАЩt you see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
Have you ever thought just maybe 
You belong with me 
You belong with me

snippet.title: Singapore leadership succession: Heng Swee Keat explains why he is stepping down as 4G team leader
snippet.description:
Singapore Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat will step aside as the leader of the fourth-generation People's Action Party (PAP) leadership team, taking himself out of running as Singapore's next prime minister, he announced on Thursday (Apr 8).

Noting that he would be in his mid-60s by the time the COVID-19 crisis is over, Mr Heng said: "While I am in good health today, it is in the best interests of the nation for someone who is younger to tackle the huge challenges ahead." https://cna.asia/3wLKhJJ

snippet.title: Highlights | Manchester City 1-2 Leeds United | Premier League
snippet.description:
Manchester City lost for only the fourth time this season as Stuart DallasвАЩ stoppage time winner ensured 10-man Leeds United stunned the Premier League leaders at the Etihad Stadium.

Dallas gave Marcelo BielsaвАЩs side the lead against the run of play when he fired a low 18-yard drive in off the post shortly before half-time, but the game appeared to swing back in CityвАЩs favour when Liam Cooper was dismissed for a reckless tackle on Gabriel Jesus in first half added time.

Pep GuardiolaвАЩs men were in total control after the break as Leeds tried to protect their lead, but Ferran Torres looked to have rescued a point when he steered Bernardo SilvaвАЩs pass into the bottom corner in the 76th minute.

City continued to pour forward in search of a winner, but were undone by a slick counter-attack when Dallas latched onto Ezgjan AlioskiвАЩs through ball and nutmegged Ederson to seal a smash and grab victory in the 91st minute.

The defeat leaves GuardiolaвАЩs men needing 11-points from our remaining six league games to be crowned champions.

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#PushpaвАЛ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjunвАЛ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #RashmikaвАЛ #Faasil #SukumarвАЛ #DSP #MythriMovieMakersвАЛ

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItвАЩs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItвАЩs a vicious cycle.

ўАўАўАўАўА
DW Documentary gives you knowledge beyond the headlines. Watch top documentaries from German broadcasters and international production companies. snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her householdвАЩs most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular вАУ a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing вАЬappropriateвАЭ engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the QueenвАЩs deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

иШЛжЮЬгАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе±ЖжЩВзЫіжТ≠еРДе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈзМґе¶ВзљЃиЇЂе†іеЕІзЭЗиЈСй¶ђгАВ

дЄїжМБжЬГеИЖжЮРеРДеїРжИ∞й¶ђж©ЯжЬГпЉМйЕНеРИеРДе†ій¶ђеМєи≥љзЄЊгАБйЂФйЗНиЃКеМЦгАБдЇЇй¶ђеРИдљЬз≠Йзµ±и®Ии≥ЗжЦЩпЉМдЄАи°®зЭЗжЩТпЉМжЦєдЊњеИ®й¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛдїКе≠£жЦ∞еҐЮAIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬпЉМйЫЖеРДй†ЕdataйА≤и°МйБЛзЃЧпЉМи≠ШеИ•еЗЇеУ™дЇЫжШѓж©ЯжЬГй¶ђпЉМдї•еЊЧеИЖйЂШдљОжОТеЇПпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉБ

дЄїжМБдЇ¶жЬГеН≥е†іиІ£з≠ФиЃАиАЕзХЩи®АпЉМиИЗиЃАиАЕдЇТеЛХдЇ§жµБпЉЫеП¶е§ЦжЬГеК†жПТй®ОзЈіи≥љеЙНи®™еХПпЉМе§ІеЃґжИЦиАЕеЊЮдЄ≠еПѓдї•жРµеИ∞жЦєеРСгАВ

ж≠§е§ЦпЉМеЗЇйЦШй†РжЄђиµ∞дљНеЬЦзХАиІАзЬЊдЇЖиІ£дїКе†іи≥љдЇЛељҐеЛҐпЉМйВКеХ≤й¶ђеПѓдї•и≥Їж≠•йАЯпЉЫйВКеХ≤й¶ђзЫЄе∞НиЭХеЇХпЉМеЛЩж±ВеєЂе§ІеЃґжНЙжЫіе§ЪеЖЈй¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛдЇ¶жЬЙеПГи≥љй¶ђи≥†зОЗиµ∞еЛҐпЉМзФ±йЪФжЩЪеИ∞еН≥е†іпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉЫйЫїиЕ¶й†Ри®ИиЗ®е†іе§ІжИґиРљй£Ый¶ђпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈиРљж≥®еЙНдљЬеПГиАГпЉМеҐЮжЈїеЛЭзЃЧгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе∞ЗжЦЉеВНжЩЪ6жЩВ10еИЖйЦЛжТ≠пЉМе±ЖжЩВYoutubeеПКгАКжЮЬзЗГеП∞гАЛжЬГеЕ®з®ЛзЫіжТ≠гАВ

snippet.title: Tearful Charles & Camilla look at flowers and a mini Land Rover for Prince Philip
snippet.description:
A TEARFUL Prince Charles and Camilla today gazed over flowers and even a mini Land Rover tribute laid in honour for Philip. 

Thousands of floral tributes have been left for the Duke of Edinburgh after he passed away aged 99 - with the messages of condolences gathered at Marlborough House.

The flowers and tributes had been left outside both Windsor Castle and Buckingham Palace, but gently moved to a private area to stop crowds gathering over Covid concerns.

And Prince Charles today appeared reflective as he looked over the sea of flowers in honour of his father the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales was pictured looking at the sincere tributes - which have flooded in from people across the country and the globe.

Continue reading
Tearful Prince Charles and Camilla look at flowers and a mini Land Rover laid by mourners in honour of Philip
https://www.thesun.co.uk/news/uknews/14655868/prince-charles-camilla-tearful-flowers-prince-philip/

snippet.title: Woman Becomes Third Wheel In Her Cat And Husband's Relationship | The Dodo Cat Crazy
snippet.description:
Sponsored by BLUE Tastefuls.

Lindsey found baby Roswell underneath a shed and decided to take him in to live with her then-boyfriend Drew. Drew and Lindsey soon got married, but they weren't the only two falling in love -- Roswell fell in love with Drew, too! Now, Lindsey is stuck in the middle of Drew and Roswell's love affair, even though she was the one to introduce the two!

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi
Lyrics - Ku. Karthik
Directed by Dongli Jumbo
DOP - Madhesh Manickam
Direction team - Raaja Senthil | Joshi | Nethan
Dop Team - Ilayaraja , Yuvaraj Dakshan ,Sandy Sanyog.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

SUBSCRIBE! http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=mancity

http://www.mancity.com
http://www.facebook.com/mancity
http://www.twitter.com/mancity
http://www.instagram.com/mancity
https://www.snapchat.com/add/mancityofficial

About the Official Man City YouTube Channel:

Here you will find all the latest videos from Manchester City, including, all Premier League goals, highlights, behind-the-scenes footage, training and much more.

Get closer to the likes of Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, Gabriel Jesus, Raheem Sterling, Riyad Mahrez, Benjamin Mendy and the rest of Pep Guardiola's team.

snippet.title: Police officer fired for pepper-spraying Black and Latino lieutenant during traffic stop
snippet.description:
Bodycam and cellphone video shows how a Virginia officer pepper-sprayed a Black and Latino Army lieutenant during a traffic stop in December. Christina Ruffini reports on the details of the stop and the lawsuit against the officers.

snippet.title: Why there won't be any military uniforms worn at Prince Philip's funeral | ITV News
snippet.description:
None of the QueenвАЩs children or grandchildren will wear their military uniforms at Prince PhilipвАЩs funeral on Saturday.

The decision had been made to avoid any embarrassment which could overshadow the funeral which will take place at Windsor Castle.

The wearing of military uniforms became an issue following Prince AndrewвАЩs decision to relinquish his royal role in 2019 over his former friendship with the convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

snippet.title: Queen Decides Royals Will Not Wear Military Uniform at Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
snippet.description:
'Queen Decides Royals Will Not Wear Military Uniform at Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral'

The Royal Family will not wear military uniform at the Duke of EdinburghвАЩs funeral.

The Queen has decided that senior royals should attend the service in mourning dress.

It means Prince Harry will not have to face being one of the only members not in uniform.

Harry lost his honorary military titles after deciding to step down as a senior working royal.

The attendance of Prince Andrew - an honorary Vice Admiral вАУ in Royal Navy uniform would also have raised issues, after he relinquished senior royal duties in 2019.

The decision is a break with tradition for ceremonial royal funerals and will contrast with the strong military presence which will be on show to honour Philip.

#PrincePhilip #DukeOfEdinburgh #TheQueen

snippet.title: Major Teaser | Telugu | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu | Sashi Tikka
snippet.description:
#Major Telugu Teaser. Major, an Indian film, releasing in Telugu, Hindi and Malayalam is produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 

вАШThe film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.вАЩ 

#MajorTeaser #MajorTheFilm #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Starring: Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma
Produced by: Sony Pictures Films India, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu DIalogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music: Sri Charan Pakala
Editing: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu), Ritesh Rajwada (Hindi)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Additional Action Choreography: Naba-Subbu
Hindi Dialogue: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Malayalam Dialogue: Yedhu-Abhijith M
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Direction Team: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi, Narendra Gautam Varma, Dinesh Jajula, Anurag Mudiganti, Balu Manoj D
DI, VFX and Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Technical Head: CV Rao
Colorist: Vishnu Vardhan K
VFX Supervisor: Venkateshwar Allagadda
Teaser Mix and Master : S. Anant Srikar
Sound Mix: Krishnaraj Arumugam
Sound Design: Ethi Raaj
P.R.O. : Vamsi-Shekar(Telugu), Sanchita Trivedi(Hindi), Athira Diljith(Malayalam)
Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu
Digital Agency: First Show(Telugu), White Rivers Media(Hindi)

Please join the microsite to share your tribute: https://majorthemovie.sonypicturesindia.com

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesnвАЩt have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! HereвАЩs to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. RadhaвАЩs father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. RadhaвАЩs father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.

snippet.description:
йАЩе§©пЉИ11жЧ•пЉЙж≤ЩзФ∞й¶ђе†ідЄКжЉФеНБдЄАе†іиНЙеЬ∞жЧ•и≥љпЉМй†≠е†іеЃЪжЦЉдЄЛеНИ12жЩВ30еИЖйЦЛиЈСгАВ

иШЛжЮЬгАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе±ЖжЩВзЫіжТ≠еРДе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈзМґе¶ВзљЃиЇЂе†іеЕІзЭЗиЈСй¶ђгАВ

зЊЕеѓМеЕ®еПКеСВеБ•е®БеЕ©е§ІиПѓз±НеАЙдЄїеЈ≤йА£иіПдЄЙеАЛи≥љжЧ•пЉМдїКжђ°дЇМдЇЇеИЖеИ•еЗЇй¶ђдєЭеМєеПКеНБеМєпЉМи≥™йЗПеЕЉеВЩпЉМжЬЙжђКеїґзЇМеЛЭзЇЬгАВ

еП¶е§Цй†≠е†іжЦ∞й¶ђи≥љпЉМз±≥йЫ™еАЛдЇЇеРНдЄЛй¶ЦеМєи≥љйІТгАМиЯ≤иНЙжИРеРНгАНз≤ЙеҐ®зЩїе†іпЉМзЭЗеРУжЬГеФФжЬГдЄАй≥ій©ЪдЇЇгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛжПРдЊЫAIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬпЉМйЫЖеРДй†ЕdataйА≤и°МйБЛзЃЧпЉМи≠ШеИ•еЗЇеУ™дЇЫжШѓж©ЯжЬГй¶ђпЉМдї•еЊЧеИЖйЂШдљОжОТеЇПпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉБ

дЄїжМБдЇ¶жЬГеН≥е†іиІ£з≠ФиЃАиАЕзХЩи®АпЉМиИЗиЃАиАЕдЇТеЛХдЇ§жµБпЉЫеП¶е§ЦжЬГеК†жПТй®ОзЈіи≥љеЙНи®™еХПпЉМе§ІеЃґжИЦиАЕеЊЮдЄ≠еПѓдї•жРµеИ∞жЦєеРСгАВ

ж≠§е§ЦпЉМе∞ЗжЬЙеЗЇйЦШй†РжЄђиµ∞дљНеЬЦпЉМз≠ЙиІАзЬЊдЇЖиІ£дїКе†іи≥љдЇЛељҐеЛҐпЉМйВКеХ≤й¶ђеПѓдї•и≥Їж≠•йАЯпЉЫйВКеХ≤й¶ђзЫЄе∞НиЭХеЇХпЉМеЛЩж±ВеєЂе§ІеЃґжНЙжЫіе§ЪеЖЈй¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛи®≠жЬЙеПГи≥љй¶ђи≥†зОЗиµ∞еЛҐпЉМзФ±йЪФжЩЪеИ∞еН≥е†іпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉЫйЫїиЕ¶й†Ри®ИиЗ®е†іе§ІжИґиРљй£Ый¶ђпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈиРљж≥®еЙНдљЬеПГиАГпЉМеҐЮжЈїеЛЭзЃЧгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе∞ЗжЦЉдЄКеНИ11жЩВ55еИЖйЦЛжТ≠пЉМе±ЖжЩВYoutubeеПКгАКжЮЬзЗГеП∞гАЛйГљжЬГеЕ®з®ЛзЫіжТ≠гАВ

snippet.title: Tiger Mums And Asian Parent Things - Real Talk Season 2 Episode 19 (ft. Annette Lee)
snippet.description:
What were some common Asian things that your parents did to discipline you?

In this episode, the cast sits down with special guest Annette Lee to talk about the crazy ways we were brought up by our parents and the kind of parents we think we will be.

snippet.title: рЯФі [Watch in HD] ONE On TNT II
snippet.description:
The biggest month in ONE Championship history continues on Thursday, 15 April, as ONE on TNT II airs right here on YouTube at 8:30 a.m. SGT (some regions excluded).
 
In the main event, reigning ONE Lightweight World Champion Christian Lee defends his belt against dangerous knockout artist Timofey Nastyukhin!
 
In the co-main event, ONE Atomweight Kickboxing World Champion Janet Todd continues her quest for two-sport gold, as she faces #3-ranked atomweight Muay Thai contender Anne Line Hogstad in "the art of eight limb" while wearing smaller mixed martial arts gloves!
 
They are joined on this explosive card by Japanese stars Yoshiki Nakahara and Shuya Kamikubo, Mongolian knockout artist Shinechagtga Zoltsetseg, South Korean slugger Kim Kyu Sung, and MORE!
 
Check out the full card for the tape-delayed event below, and make sure you tune in right here on YouTube!
 
MAIN CARD:
 
Lightweight World Championship
Christian Lee vs. Timofey Nastyukhin
 
Women's Atomweight Muay Thai
Janet Todd vs. Anne Line Hogstad
 
LEAD CARD:
 
Featherweight Mixed Martial Arts
Shinechagtga Zoltsetseg vs. Yoshiki Nakahara
 
Flyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Kim Kyu Sung vs. Wang Shuo
 
Bantamweight Mixed Martial Arts
Mitchell Chamale vs. Shuya Kamikubo

#ONEonTNT2 #ONEChampionship

bg.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
bg.description:
гАРsubscribeгАСвЖТhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series вАЬUltraman TriggerвАЭ was conceived as a homage to вАЬUltraman TigaвАЭ, the first of the three beloved late 90вАЩs вАЬTDGвАЭ series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core вАЬTigaвАЭ story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of вАЬwanting to make everyone smileвАЭ at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

вШЕSTORYвЖУ
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to timeвА¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, KengoвАЩs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will KengoвАЩs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

вЦЉFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
вШЖUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

#UltramanTrigger #UltramanTiga

It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of вАЬwanting to make everyone smileвАЭ at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

вШЕSTORYвЖУ
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to timeвА¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, KengoвАЩs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will KengoвАЩs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

вЦЉFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
вШЖUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

zh-CN.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
zh-CN.description:
гАРsubscribeгАСвЖТhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series вАЬUltraman TriggerвАЭ was conceived as a homage to вАЬUltraman TigaвАЭ, the first of the three beloved late 90вАЩs вАЬTDGвАЭ series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core вАЬTigaвАЭ story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of вАЬwanting to make everyone smileвАЭ at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

вШЕSTORYвЖУ
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to timeвА¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, KengoвАЩs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will KengoвАЩs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

вЦЉFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
вШЖUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

#UltramanTrigger #UltramanTiga

It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of вАЬwanting to make everyone smileвАЭ at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

вШЕSTORYвЖУ
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to timeвА¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, KengoвАЩs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will KengoвАЩs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

вЦЉFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
вШЖUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

el.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
el.description:
гАРsubscribeгАСвЖТhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series вАЬUltraman TriggerвАЭ was conceived as a homage to вАЬUltraman TigaвАЭ, the first of the three beloved late 90вАЩs вАЬTDGвАЭ series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core вАЬTigaвАЭ story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of вАЬwanting to make everyone smileвАЭ at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

вШЕSTORYвЖУ
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to timeвА¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, KengoвАЩs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will KengoвАЩs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

вЦЉFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
вШЖUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

#UltramanTrigger #UltramanTiga

fi.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
fi.description:
гАРsubscribeгАСвЖТhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series вАЬUltraman TriggerвАЭ was conceived as a homage to вАЬUltraman TigaвАЭ, the first of the three beloved late 90вАЩs вАЬTDGвАЭ series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core вАЬTigaвАЭ story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of вАЬwanting to make everyone smileвАЭ at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

вШЕSTORYвЖУ
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to timeвА¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, KengoвАЩs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will KengoвАЩs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

вЦЉFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
вШЖUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

Emulating the core вАЬTigaвАЭ story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of вАЬwanting to make everyone smileвАЭ at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

snippet.title: Steph Curry HISTORIC Performance Posting 42 PTS & 11 3PM! рЯФ•
snippet.description:
Steph with 42 PTS in 3 Qs with 0 turnovers tonight, including 25 PTS in the 3rd Q on a perfect 8-for-8 from the field. He is the ONLY player in NBA history to have multiple back-to-back games with 10 3PM. Since individual turnovers have been tracked (1977-78), this is the 4th instance where a player has recorded 40+ points and 10+ threes with 0 turnovers.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Sheffield United vs Arsenal (0-3) | Premier League | Lacazette, Martinelli
snippet.description:
Alexandre Lacazette claimed his 50th Premier League goal as we returned to winning ways in convincing fashion at Bramall Lane.

The Frenchman opened the scoring with his 49th in the competition - applying the finishing touch to a wonderful team move - before sealing the win late on with goal number 50, tucking home Thomas Partey's excellent throughball.

In between those two goals, Gabriel Martinelli scored his first for 15 months, after good work from Nicolas Pepe.

There was a welcome clean sheet as well, as we prepared for Thursday's must-win encounter in Prague in the perfect manner.

The only blot on the evening was an injury to Bukayo Saka, and it was the youngster вАУ operating in a free role behind the forwards вАУ who had our first attempt, blazing over after bursting into the penalty area.

The hosts were passing the ball nicely themselves though and David McGoldrick fired a shot just wide from the edge of the area in an evenly matched opening quarter of an hour.

But our link-up play up front was much improved from recent weeks, and we soon took control. Saka, Pepe and Martinelli were combing particularly well, while Dani Ceballos was full of nice touches in midfield.

It was one such delightful flick from the Spaniard that set up the opening goal for Lacazette. We worked the ball well outside the area, with Thomas Partey and Saka involved, before Ceballos found Lacazette with a deft touch, and he finished neatly past Aaron Ramsdale. It was a wonderful flowing team goal, and no more than we deserved at that point.

Martinelli had already flashed a couple of efforts wide while Calum Chambers вАУ up from full back вАУ had seen his low effort blocked by a defender when it seemed destined for the net.

Martinelli himself had a goalbound effort blocked when the ball fell to him from a half-cleared corner.

We were well on top by the break, and should really have been further ahead.

We continued to make chances after the break вАУ Lacazette was unable to supply the finishing touch after being set up by Pepe вАУ but we didn't look comfortable until the second goal finally came, 20 minutes from time.

It was Pepe who pounced on a loose pass, his low shot was only parried by Ramsdale, and Martinelli was in the right place to tap home his first goal since netting at Stamford Bridge in January 2020.

Lacazette raced through late on and confidently tucked home Partey's pass to bring up his half century - becoming the 10th Arsenal player to the landmark.

Now all thoughts shift to the Europa League.

#arsenal #martinelli #lacazette

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

snippet.title: Royal expert tells Meghan Markle вАШbe quietвАЩ ahead of Prince Philip's funeral
snippet.description:
A royal expert says Meghan Markle вАЬshould be quietвАЭ following reports the Duchess of Sussex isnвАЩt attending Prince PhilipвАЩs funeral because she doesnвАЩt want to the вАЬcentre of attention.вАЭ

It comes after the Mail Online reported a friend of MeghanвАЩs said the Duchess isnвАЩt attending the funeral to avoid stealing the limelight from Philip.

Angela Levin slammed Ms Markle over the reports-

вАЬI think it's astonishing that somebody who has been a member of the Royal Family for a very short time has the audacity to think she is going to be the centre of attention at a funeral of the most extraordinary man of 99 who was the husband of the queen for over 70 yearsвАЭ, she told the Sun.

"You come and you're very quiet, you sit in the back and wear black as you are told.вАЭ

вАЬIf you don't want to be centre of attention then be quiet."

A Buckingham Palace spokesperson confirmed Meghan isnвАЩt attending the funeral because she is heavily pregnant however the Duchess is yet to confirm.

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her вАШstrength and stayвАЩ | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.вАѓ 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the вАШWidow of WindsorвАЩ.

snippet.title: Prince Harry Preparing to Return to UK for Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Harry is expected to return to the UK for his grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral.

The Duke of Sussex is making preparations to fly back from his US home, though it was unclear whether his wife, Meghan Markle, or son, Archie, would be returning with him.

It is expected the Duke will be buried in Frogmore Gardens, following a small family service at St George's Chapel in the grounds of Windsor Castle.

localized.title: Prince Harry Preparing to Return to UK for Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
localized.description:
Prince Harry is expected to return to the UK for his grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral.

The Duke of Sussex is making preparations to fly back from his US home, though it was unclear whether his wife, Meghan Markle, or son, Archie, would be returning with him.

It is expected the Duke will be buried in Frogmore Gardens, following a small family service at St George's Chapel in the grounds of Windsor Castle.

snippet.title: HARI BAHHAGIA - ATTA Halilintar & AUREL Hermansyah - ( OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Listen Hari Bahhagia : 
https://lnk.to/HariBahhagia

*
Di sela kesibukannya meyiapkan hari pernikahan, Atta Halilintar dan Aurel Hermansyah membuat kejutan dengan single terbaru mereka berjudul HARI BAHHAGIA. Lagu yang terinspirasi dari kisah perjalanan mereka mulai dari masa bahagia, hingga masa sulit tertuang dalam lagu tersebut.

 вАЬAku kepengin banget menceritakan kisah cinta ini untuk Aurel. Dan kayaknya menyampaikan lewat lagu sudah pas sekali. Awalnya, ini lagu hanya dari aku untuk Aurel, bukan direncanakan untuk duet,вАЭ jelas Atta.

 Memang benar. Awal mula single ini hanyalah ungkapan perasaan bahagia dan syukur Atta, karena akan bersama Aurel dalam ikatan pernikahan. Dan ini tadinya merupakan kado rahasia yang disiapkan Atta untuk Aurel. Ketika Atta memberikan lagu itu untuk Aurel untuk di dengarkan, ia pun ingin berduet menyanyikannya bareng dengan Atta. Alhasil, lagu yang sudah jadi pun dirombak sebagai lagu duet.

*
Credit Music :
Song Producer : Atta Halilintar
Song composer : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Leztey
Aranger : Leztey
Music & Lyric : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Leztey
Vocal Directed by : Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Metha Zulia
Vocal Recorded at : Atta Music Studio
Vocal Audio Angineered by : Leztey
Mixed & Mastered : Leztey

*
Credit Music Video :

Produced by : Satria Kinayungan
Directed by : Upie Guava
Co-Director by : Tb Elvan
Edited by : Upie Guava, Tb Elvan
Gaffer by : Wan Black

*

snippet.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu вАЬHampa HatikuвАЭ (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

вАЬLagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,вАЭ ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

вАЬSemua orang bisa menyanyikan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,вАЭ kata Lesti. 

вАЬDalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,вАЭ jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

вАЬKolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ,вАЭ ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

localized.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
localized.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu вАЬHampa HatikuвАЭ (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

вАЬLagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,вАЭ ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

вАЬSemua orang bisa menyanyikan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,вАЭ kata Lesti. 

вАЬDalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,вАЭ jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

вАЬKolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan вАЬBismillah CintaвАЭ,вАЭ ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

snippet.title: Watch live: The Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, has died
snippet.description:
Buckingham Palace has announced that His Royal Highness Prince Philip has died.

The Duke was married to Queen Elizabeth II for more than 70 years and became the longest-serving consort in British history.

His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle.

зЊОжЩґзЙЗе≥∞жЬГйЫЖзµРгАМеПНдЄ≠иБѓзЫЯгАНпЉБ жЛЬзЩїйЭ†еП∞зБ£зЙМгАМдЄАж°ГжЃЇдЄЙе£ЂгАНпЉЯпЉБ
еЕ±ж©Я25жЮґжђ°жУЊеП∞еКНжМЗгАМзЊЕжЦѓз¶ПгАНпЉЯ еЕ±иїНжЬАеЉЈеПНиИ™жѓНзµДеРИжЫЭеЕЙпЉБпЉЯ
дњДзЩљиБѓиїНеЕ©йЭҐе§ЊжУКзГПеЕЛиШ≠пЉБ йїСжµЈжОАжИ∞йЫ≤дњДзГПгАМзµВе∞ЗдЄАжИ∞гАНпЉЯ
е§™й≠ѓйЦ£иЩЯгАМйШње•љжЫњж≠їйђЉгАНжЫЭеЕЙпЉБ жЭОзЊ©з••жіЊйїСеЈ•йЦЛжА™жЙЛеЃ≥49еСљ

12еРЛжКУжЙЛи£° 8еРЛдЄНзµ¶дљ†вА¶ жЛЬзЩїеАЯеКЫеП∞зБ£зЙМ е∞НдЄ≠зІСжКАйЦЛжИ∞гАМдЄАж°ГжЃЇдЄЙе£ЂгАНпЉБ
зЊОеНКе∞ОйЂФе≥∞жЬГеРєйЯњгАМеПНдЄ≠иБѓзЫЯгАНйЫЖзµРиЩЯпЉБ жЛЬзЩїжЙЛжП°гАМжЩґеЬУгАН еП∞жИРењЕзИ≠дєЛеЬ∞пЉЯ
дЄЙжШЯгАБзЙєжЦѓжЛЙдЊЖеП∞еЫЇж§њжРґжЩґзЙЗпЉБжП≠зІШгАМдЄЙжШЯгАБиБѓйЫїгАНз†іе§©иНТеРИдљЬиГМеЊМвА¶ еКНжМЗпЉЯ
жЛЬзЩїгАМдЄАж°ГжЃЇдЄЙе£ЂгАНпЉБжЙЛжП°жЩґеЬУжАТжЦЈгАМиПѓзВЇгАБе∞Пз±≥гАНжФєи≥£жЩЇжЕІйЫїеЛХиїКж±ВзФЯиЈѓпЉЯпЉБ

дЄ≠зЊОгАМеПНиИ™жѓНгАНе§ІжИ∞йЦЛжЙУпЉБ еЫЮжУКзЊОгАМдЊЃиЊ±зЕІгАН еЕ±иїНж©ЯзЊ§еЬНжФїзЊЕжЦѓз¶ПпЉЯ
еЙµеЦЃжЧ•жЦ∞йЂШпЉБ зИЖгАМ25жЮґжђ°гАНжУЊеП∞еП¶жЬЙзЫЃж®ЩпЉЯ гАМжЦ∞гАНиИ™жѓНзНµжЃЇзµДеРИжЫЭеЕЙ
жП≠зІШеЕ±иїНжЬАеЉЈеПНиИ™жѓНзµДеРИпЉБ гАМжЃ≤-16+иљЯ-6гАНйЗНзПЊиШЗиБѓзЩЊжЮЪй£ЫељИжµЈпЉБпЉЯ
иЉГеЛБжДПеС≥жњГпЉБ зЊОзІАгАМзњєиЕ≥гАНзЕІ йЩЄеЫЮеЧЖгАМдЄЙе§ІжИ∞еНАгАНеѓ¶ељИжЉФи®УзХЂйЭҐвА¶
дЄНеЦЃзіФпЉБ йЩЄ22еЮЛй£ЫељИењЂиЙЗгАМеЖНгАНеЗЇйЮШвА¶ йЗНзПЊжЭ±еЬ∞дЄ≠жµЈзХФзЪДжЪійҐ®йЫ®пЉЯ
еЫЫељИжСІжѓАжЭ±еЬ∞дЄ≠жµЈжЬАе§ІжµЈиїНпЉБ дї•гАМеЯГжЛЙзЙєгАНиЩЯй©ЕйАРиЙ¶зЪДжЬЂжЧ•дєЛжЧЕвА¶
дї•иЙ≤еИЧзЪДй£ЫељИйЭ©еСљпЉБпЉБгАМе°ФеЯЇдЇЮгАНжИ∞ељєеЙµзПЊдї£жµЈжИ∞гАМжїЕйЦАзіЪгАНзіАйМДвА¶

гАМйВ™жГ°иїЄењГеЬЛгАНеРєиµЈеЃ£жИ∞иЩЯиІТпЉЯ дњДеЬЛеЕ®зЈЪйЦЛжИ∞зЊОжБРйЫЩйЭҐе§ЊжУКпЉЯ
дњДеЬЛгАМеЕ®зЈЪеВЩжИ∞гАНзЩљзЊЕжЦѓгАМи£ЭзФ≤й¶≥жПігАНвА¶зГПеЕЛиШ≠йЫЩйЭҐе§ЊжУКдњДзГПзµВе∞ЗдЄАжИ∞пЉЯ
дњДеЬЛжЭ±и•њгАМйЫЩйВКйЦЛзБЂгАНпЉБ гАМеМЧж•µиЮНеЖ∞дєЛжЩВгАНзЊОжЧ•жБРйЭҐгАМж†Єй≠ЪйЫЈгАНзИЖжУКпЉЯ
зЊОдЉКиЂЗеИ§зµВзД°иІ£пЉЯ гАМеЕ©еЬЛзОЛдЄНи¶ЛзОЛгАНйЧЬйНµжЩВеИїдЉКжЬЧйЦУиЂЬиИєзЂЯйБ≠и•≤пЉЯ

snippet.title: I am a Teacher - Official Short Film
snippet.description:
After getting fired from the academy, Madam Soot Beng is forced to find a new job or risk losing everything important to her; even if it means she has to stop doing what she loves, teaching. 
Behind the scenes: https://youtu.be/SBVOtXWvMWw
'Never Falling' MV: https://youtu.be/9R99CaGVKwk

Follow me on Instagram for latest updates: http://www.instagram.com/thejianhaotan
Join the channel membership to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGwcH4qnJ2qM_ZJUSFcAMAA/join

I am a Teacher.
Written and Directed by JianHao Tan
Produced by Titan Studios
Executive Producer: JianHao Tan
Starring: Amander Liew, Vicky Low, Alex Lee, Keith Lee, Valerie Tan, Sherly Devonne Ng, Lewis Loo, Mandy Leong, Louise E. Donaghey
Director of Photography: Nurhakim Suhaimi
Edited by: Nurhakim Suhaimi
Music by: Daniel Veerapen
Post Production Sound Service by Deroma Productions
Original music "Never Falling" performed by AmanderSings

Get your merch now: http://www.teamtitanstore.com 

Titan Digital Media: 
http://www.titandigitalmedia.com

snippet.title: и¶БжИШдЊњжИШпЉБзЊОеЖЫиИ∞иЬВжЛ•жИ™еБЬиЊљеЃБиИ™жѓНпЉМиІ£жФЊеЖЫжТХз†іжµЈдЄКе∞БйФБзЇњпЉБзЊОиИ∞иЄПеЕ•дЄ≠иИ∞е∞Дз®ЛдєЛеЖЕпЉМдЄАе£∞еЈ®еУНдЄЦзХМйҐ§жКЦгАВдїКе§ЬжИСдїђе∞ЖиІБиѓБеОЖеП≤жАІжЧґеИїпЉМдЄАжЛЫе•†еЃЪеНЧжµЈдє±е±АгАВ#еНЧжµЈжИШдЇЙ# #иЊљеЃБеПЈ# #зЊОеЖЫиИ∞йЧіи∞Н#
snippet.description:
и¶БжИШдЊњжИШпЉБзЊОеЖЫиИ∞жЛ¶иЕ∞жТЮеЗїиЊљеЃБиИ™жѓНпЉМиІ£жФЊеЖЫжО•иИЈиВЙжРПжЛЉеИЇеИАпЉБзБЂзВЃжЬЇжЮ™йљРеЉАзБЂпЉМйФ§зИЖзЊОеЖЫдЄНж≤ЙжИШиИ∞гАВдїКе§ЬжИСдїђе∞ЖиІБиѓБеОЖеП≤жАІжЧґеИїпЉМдЄАжИШе•†еЃЪеНЧжµЈдє±е±АгАВдЄ≠еЫљйҐЖеЬЯпЉМзФ®зФЯеСљжННеНЂпЉБ#еНЧжµЈжИШдЇЙ# #иЊљеЃБеПЈ# #зЊОеЖЫиИ∞йЧіи∞Н#

иЊљеЃБеПЈењљзДґиҐЂзЊОеЖЫиИ∞зЫСиІЖ   0:10
зЊОеЖЫиИ∞еѓєдЄ≠еЫљжМСи°Е   4:12
дЄ≠еЫљз•≠еЗЇж≠¶еЩ®ињЫи°Мж≠¶еКЫеПНеЗї    6:02
е§ІеЃґе•љпЉМжИСжШѓе∞ПдЇФењЂжК•пЉМдЄЦзХМжЦ∞йЧїдЄАзљСжЙУе∞љгАВ
гАРжђҐињОиЃҐйШЕе∞ПдЇФењЂжК•https://goo.gl/Xkb5WMгАС

1гАБеЪ£еЉ†иЗ≥жЮБпЉБзЊОиИ™жѓНеЉЇйЧѓеН∞еЇ¶еН†е≤ЫпЉМйЂШи∞ГеЃ£еЄГжО•зЃ°пЉМеЕ®дЄЦзХМеЬ®зЬЛеН∞еЇ¶зђСиѓЭгАВдЄНжЦЩиОЂињ™иДЄиЙ≤йУБйЭТпЉМйЪПеРОеТђзЙЩйАЉеЗЇеЫЫе≠Чи°Адї§пЉМдЄЗеР®еѓЉеЉєзЮђйЧійљРе∞ДпЉМжГ®зГИзФїйЭҐиЃ©дЇЇиГЖеѓТгАВе•љж†ЈзЪДиОЂињ™пЉБhttps://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aJiD7LJKHko
2гАБе§™иІ£ж∞ФпЉБжЛЫжГєдЄ≠еЫљеРОжЊ≥жі≤еЃ£еСКеИЖи£ВпЉМжНҐжАїзРЖгАБжФєеЫљж≠МгАБж∞ЄињЬдЇ≤еНОпЉБиґЕеНБдЄЗж∞СдЉЧеЖ≤ињЫиЃЃдЉЪпЉМиОЂйЗМж£ЃжФњеЇЬињОжЭ•е§ІжЄЕжіЧгАВдїКе§ЬдЄЦзХМзЫЃеЕЙиБЪзД¶жЊ≥жі≤пЉМй¶ЦдЄ™еИЖи£ВеЫљеЃґеН≥е∞ЖиѓЮзФЯпЉБhttps://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gpD4f...вАЛ
3гАБйЗНйЕњи°Аж°ИпЉЯеП™еЫ†йЯ©еЫљдЄНиВѓе±ИжЬНпЉМжЛЬзЩїеѓєжЦЗеЬ®еѓЕз•≠еЗЇињљжЭАдї§пЉБжЭАжЙЛгАБиіҐйШАгАБж±Йе•ЄиБФеРИеЫіе†µпЉМжЦЗеЬ®еѓЕйЩЈеЕ•зїЭеҐГгАВеЕ≥йФЃжЧґеИїеМЧдЇђдїЕдЄАжЛЫжЙ≠иљђеЕ®зЫШе±АеКњпЉМжЦЗеЬ®еѓЕеРЂзГ≠ж≥™жЙУеУНеПНзЊОзђђдЄАжЮ™пЉБhttps://www.youtube.com/watch?v=992gF...

snippet.title: Prince Philip has died aged 99 @BBC News live рЯФі BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and рЯФФ to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube рЯСЙ https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer рЯСЙ https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband, has died aged 99, Buckingham Palace has announced.

The prince married Princess Elizabeth in 1947, five years before she became Queen, and was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

A statement from Buckingham Palace said: "It is with deep sorrow that Her Majesty The Queen has announced the death of her beloved husband, His Royal Highness The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh.

"His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle."

Follow the story рЯСЙ https://bbc.in/3fYe0J5

snippet.title: His Royal Highness the Duke of Edinburgh has died: Watch ITV News coverage
snippet.description:
His Royal Highness The Duke ofвАѓEdinburgh has died aged 99.

Prince Philip, the Queen's consort of more than 70 years, passed away at Windsor Castle on Friday, Buckingham Palace has announced.

He was the longest-serving consort in British history and dedicated decades of his life to royal duty, serving the nation at the monarchвАЩs side.

snippet.title: Security Council Arria formula meeting on Myanmar
snippet.description:
On 1 February, MyanmarвАЩs military launched a coup that halted abruptly the countryвАЩs democratic transition. The military prevented the convening of the democratically elected parliament and arbitrarily detained the countryвАЩs civilian leaders, including State Counsellor Aung San Suu Kyi and President Win Myint. The reaction of the people of Myanmar has been resolute вАУ hundreds of thousands of peaceful protesters have taken to the streets to demand that the outcome of NovemberвАЩs election is respected and to call for the reversal of the coup.

The Arria meeting provides a platform for Myanmar voices to brief the Security Council on the current situation from their perspectives and those of the people that they represent. It will be an opportunity to understand the objectives of the pro-democracy movement, including the 31 March Federal Democracy Charter and the movementвАЩs ongoing engagement with ethnic groups and religious minorities.

snippet.title: Meet Some Of The Last Papyrus Makers In Egypt Keeping A 5,000-Year-Old Craft Alive | Still Standing
snippet.description:
Papyrus paper originated in ancient Egypt. Today, just one village still makes the paper, but after a year without tourists, workers are struggling to keep their doors open.

Saied and Atef sell their products locally in Egypt.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy вАУ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max вАУ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieвАЛ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/вАЛ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/вАЛ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event вАЬSpace Jam: A New Legacy,вАЭ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.вАЩs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвАЩve never seen them before.  ItвАЩs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвАЩs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even вАЬKingвАЭ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the вАЬAvengersвАЭ films, вАЬHotel RwandaвАЭ), Khris Davis (вАЬJudas and the Black Messiah,вАЭ TVвАЩs вАЬAtlantaвАЭ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVвАЩs вАЬThe Walking Dead,вАЭ вАЬStar Trek: DiscoveryвАЭ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вАЬLooney Tunes CartoonsвАЭ), Eric Bauza (вАЬLooney Tunes CartoonsвАЭ), and Zendaya (upcoming вАЬDune,вАЭ вАЬMalcolm & MarieвАЭ).

Lee (вАЬGirls Trip,вАЭ вАЬNight SchoolвАЭ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmвАЩs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorвАЩs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (вАЬSpider-Man: HomecomingвАЭ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (вАЬWonder ParkвАЭ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (вАЬThe MuleвАЭ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixвАЩs вАЬWhen They See UsвАЭ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming вАЬEternalsвАЭ), editor Bob Ducsay (вАЬGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вАЭ вАЬStar Wars Episode VIII вАУ The Last JediвАЭ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (вАЬRampage,вАЭ вАЬWar for the Planet of the ApesвАЭ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (вАЬGreenbook,вАЭ NetflixвАЩs вАЬBridgertonвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, вАЬSpace Jam: A New Legacy.вАЭ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

localized.title: Adriano Moraes vs. Demetrious Johnson | ONE Championship Full Fight
localized.description:
A sensational KNOCKOUT closed out the historic World Title clash between defending flyweight king Adriano Moraes and all-time great Demetrious Johnson in the main event of ONE on TNT I!

#ONEonTNT #ONEChampionship

snippet.title: Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh and consort to the Queen, dies aged 99 | ABC News
snippet.description:
Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh and consort to his wife Queen Elizabeth II for more than 60 years, has died at the age of 99.  The Duke suffered ailing health in recent years and retired from royal duties in 2017. Subscribe: http://ab.co/1svxLVE 

ABC News provides around the clock coverage of news events as they break in Australia and abroad, including the latest coronavirus pandemic updates. It's news when you want it, from Australia's most trusted news organisation.

Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh and consort to his wife Queen Elizabeth II for more than 60 years, has died at the age of 99.  The Duke suffered ailing health in recent years and retired from royal duties in 2017. Subscribe: http://ab.co/1svxLVE 

ABC News provides around the clock coverage of news events as they break in Australia and abroad, including the latest coronavirus pandemic updates. It's news when you want it, from Australia's most trusted news organisation.

snippet.title: The Demons Baron Battled | Toni Talks
snippet.description: Talking to Baron made me reflect on my own life, the truth is, we all have done things in the past we are not proud of and we wouldnвАЩt want to see in the headlines. But the beauty of his story is that no matter how many times you messed up your life, God will always love you and will never look at you the way others do.

snippet.title: I Only Made Korean Food For 24 Hours
snippet.description:

Thank you to Maangchi!

snippet.title: Gempa Berkekuatan 6,7 Magnitudo Guncang Malang
snippet.description:
Gempa bumi berkekuatan 6,7 skala Richter mengguncang Kabupaten Malang, Jawa Timur, Sabtu (10/4/2021). Episenter gempa berada di laut dengan jarak 90 km arah barat daya dari Kabupaten Malang.

snippet.title: Falcon And The Winter Soldier EPISODE 4 Breakdown & Ending Explained Review | Marvel MCU Easter Eggs
snippet.description:
Falcon And The Winter Soldier EPISODE 4 Breakdown & Ending Explained Review | Marvel MCU Easter Eggs. We review, recap and explain the fourth episode of TFATWS on Disney Plus. This contains easter eggs, theories, spoilers and a breakdown of the events and behind the scenes leaks on the Marvel property. We also discuss where things could be going with Wakanda, US Agent aka John Walker, Bucky, Zemo and Sam of course The Power Broker.

#FalconAndTheWinterSoldierвАЛ #Episode4 #MarvelвАЛ #MCUвАЛ #BreakdownвАЛ #FalconвАЛ #CaptainAmericaвАЛ #WinterSoldierвАЛ #BuckyBarnesвАЛ #FlagsmasherвАЛ #DisneyPlus #USAgent #Zemo #ThePowerBroker

Falcon And The Winter Soldier is the new Marvel MCU Phase 4 Disney Plus show that follows Captain America's best buddies as they take on Baron Zemo, The Flag Smashers and US Agent. We will be doing weekly breakdowns, trailer reactions, easter egg hunts and discussing the things you missed in our reviews and recaps.

If you enjoyed this video then please subscribe to the channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ?sub_confirmation=1

If You Want To Help Support The Channel So I Can Make More Videos Like This Please Donate Here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ/join

Get some awesome Heavy Spoilers show clothes, phonecases and accessories at - https://teespring.com/en-GB/stores/deffinitions-store

*Check out our BEST new videos below*
*Godzilla Vs Kong Easter Eggs* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abs9qnbQ1K0
*The Walking Dead Season 10 Ending Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S3GBF7IqHBA
*Invincible Episode 4 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r6JSynjpk8g
*Falcon And The Winter Soldier Episode 3 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mfSE64uN4uY
*Godzilla Vs Kong Ending Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WqcLtrAmwXs
*Omni-Man Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=33AtqStgVl8
*Insane Details In Zack Snyder's Justice League* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX6qforbKyI


/* ----- SOCIAL MEDIA ----- */

Follow Me On Social Media At:
https://www.facebook.com/DeffinitionMC/
https://twitter.com/heavyspoilers
https://www.instagram.com/heavyspoilers/


/* ----- VIDEO INFORMATION ----- */

0:00 Falcon And The Winter Soldier Episode 4 Intro
0:26 Captain America The First Avenger Episode 1 Easter Egg
0:44 Episode 3 Recap
1:27 X-Men Easter Egg?
1:58 Episode 4 Breakdown
15:53 Episode 4 Reaction And Review
18:11 Episode 5 Big Character Cameo News

After a thrilling season we're finally getting all of the pieces falling into place and there's a lot of plot theories, easter eggs and things you missed that we're gonna be talking about in this video.

Before that though I just wanna point out an easter egg I got sent by Logan Kelly 13 on instagram who pointed out that in the museum in episode 1 we see a photo of Steve holding the Taxi door with the star on it. If we jump back to Captain America The First Avenger we can actually see the person who took this photo standing in the crowd showing that (it's alllll connected)

It's all connected.

Last week saw Sam and Bucky freeing Zemo in order to track down the origins of the brand new and improved Super Soldier Serum and this led them to Madripoor. After learning it was the Power Broker all along they were reunited with Sharon Carter who seemed more suspicious than Tom Holland trying to keep a secret.

We also got a small clip of Zemo busting out dance moves that would make Star Lord and Justin Hammer evacuate the Dance floor.

Earlier in the week The actor behind him Daniel Bruhl revealed that he actually did a longer dance but that Marvel cut it down and after fans united together and got #ReleaseTheZemoCut trending they dropped an hour long version of it last night.

I sat through the entire thing seventy five times, I don't give a f***

There was also a road sign on the embassy that a lot of people commented saying was a nod to the X-men and I actually drove around throughout the week looking for this on the road. I got the wife to take a photo of it and as you can see...it clearly confirms that the X-men exist in the Heavy Spoilers universe too.

We ended with a cliffhanger and saw that Ayo had been sent from Wakanda to bring Zemo in. Before you could say 'Wakanda sh*t is this) we cut to black...panther's music.

snippet.title: Siti Nurhaliza Hadiahkan Lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU Buat Ernie Zakri & Syamel Walaupun Tengah Sarat
snippet.description:
Majlis resepsi Ernie Zakri dan Syamel sememangnya meriah dengan kehadiran rakan artis dan juga para peminat masing-masing yang sama-sama meraikan hari istimewa pasangan ini.

Selain daripada majlis yang sederhana namun terlihat eksklusif itu, kehadiran penyanyi nombor satu negera, Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang sudah sarat hamil anak kedua juga cukup membuatkan ramai вАШhisteriaвАЩ.

Beliau yang hadir bersama suami tercinta, Datuk Seri Khalid Mohd Jiwa dilihat mengenakan busana bewarna merah jambu telah berdiri dan spontan menyanyikan lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU hadiah buat pasangan pengantin. 

Walaupun usia kandungan sudah menghampiri sembilan bulan, suara Tok Ti masih lagi power dan mendapat sorakan daripada semua yang hadir.

Dapat dilihat wajah gembira pasangan Ernie Zakri dan Syamel yang begitu teruja вАШdihadiahkanвАЩ dendangan lagu yang cukup istimewa buat penyanyi kesayangan ramai itu.

Menerusi media sosial, baik di Twitter ataupun di TikTok, kesemuanya memuji penampilan Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang begitu humble dan masih power menyampaikan lagu walaupun sedang sarat hamil anak kedua. #SITINURHALIZA #SYAMELERNIE
